economic_notes: Subsidiaries include White Lake Resources Corporation, Gitchi Animki Energy LP, Gitchi Animki Energy Corporation, Gitchi Animki Finance Corp., Maygwayyawk Forestry Services Corp., Giizis Power LP, Giizis Power GP Corp. GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: White Lake Limited Partnership and BMI-Maamwigaaboo Contracting (2017) LP. Portfolio investments include Pic Mobert Hydro Inc. ($70,977,621), Muskoka Solar LP ($1,797,788), and Rosseau Power LP ($847,556). Due to Regional Power Inc. of $92,137,534 is a significant related-party liability.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence for a controlled entity consolidated under modified equity method (White Lake Limited Partnership - unaudited condensed financials provided). The qualification also applied to prior year 2022. Significant related-party liability: Due to Regional Power Inc. $92,137,534 which substantially exceeds total financial assets excluding portfolio investments. Loans receivable of $3,400,000 to White Lake Limited Partnership (related party, unsecured, non-interest bearing, no set repayment terms) is new in 2023. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 but audit report is dated January 28, 2025 - significant delay. Total government transfers estimated as sum of ISC + AETS + Dilico + Ministry of Health + Ministry of Children + OFNLP + UOI + CMHC + Kinomaadswin + Ministry of Education + Ministry of Indigenous Affairs + Ministry of Transportation = $9,201,761+$19,079+$501,963+$224,907+$1,094,655+$685,697+$550,407+$409,586+$4,446,891+$133,208+$1,317,131+$38,500 = $18,623,785; OSR = $20,976,299 - $18,623,785 = $2,352,514. Note: Capital Programs expenses $2,886,279 and Economic Development Programs $3,380,496 not mapped to standard categories.
